product_title: Silver King HF5SK471 1 Quart Hydronic Formula #5 Hot Water Systems Boiler Cleaner Inhibitor With Silicone SK-471
clean_review_text: I have used this product for the past 3 years in my Peerless 3 section boiler. This is the 4th year I am adding the product according to directions. I use the full bottle. As my photos show, the inside of a Honeywell zone valve and a Taco 007 pump are coated with a black film. I was under the impression this product kept the system clean and lubricated. The little water I drained out of the system when changing the pump and zone valve did not look dirty. Slightly brown. I don't think this is a good boiler cleaner. But I do like the idea of a silicone lubricant kept in the system throughout the year. I have no way of telling how bad the pump and valve would have looked if I had not used the product, or had I used a different product.
llm_complaint_title: Leaves black film on boiler parts
